156ab26a7d8c.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
156ab26a7d8c.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
156ab26a7d8c.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

7de8a16c78d1.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
7de8a16c78d1.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
7de8a16c78d1.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

6e4dd6d50c6c.title: Build review volume — you lack statistical credibility
6e4dd6d50c6c.description: Only 13 Google reviews. A single bad review moves your average visibly. Encourage satisfied customers to leave reviews.

d238fa5b2467.title: Renew formal trust proof before it becomes a visible drag
d238fa5b2467.description: Last inspected 125.4 years ago. A stale inspection date erodes trust scoring and signals to customers that compliance isn't actively managed. Request a voluntary re-inspection once you're confident of a strong result.
d238fa5b2467.expected_upside: Fresh compliance proof, trust signal renewal
d238fa5b2467.management_implication: Stale trust is a hidden ceiling on your overall position.

627e52e4d7dd.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
627e52e4d7dd.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

31b51d43e315.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
31b51d43e315.description: Your 4.5/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P20.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
31b51d43e315.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

b62f4b1112ee.title: Ranked #5 of 6 locally — peers are ahead
b62f4b1112ee.description: At percentile 20.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.
